error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please generate a bug report and open a GitHub issue so we can fix it.
error_boundary.github_prompt: Please open a GitHub issue and attach the downloaded .fabreport file.

bug_report.alert:
FABKIT Bug Report

This will:
1. Take a screenshot of the current page
2. Ask a few questions
3. Download a .fabreport file

The report includes your current card state (including artwork), full gallery contents, and recent console errors. No data is sent anywhere — the file is saved locally.

Click OK to continue.
bug_report.prompt_what_broke:
What broke? (required)

Describe the problem you encountered:
bug_report.prompt_last_actions:
What were you doing when it broke? (required)

Describe your last few actions:
bug_report.prompt_comments:
Any additional comments? (optional)

Leave blank or cancel to skip:

bug_report_viewer.title: Bug Report Viewer
bug_report_viewer.subtitle: Load a .fabreport file to inspect its contents
bug_report_viewer.upload_prompt: Drop a .fabreport file here, or click to browse
bug_report_viewer.upload_hint: Only .fabreport files are accepted. Nothing is uploaded anywhere.
bug_report_viewer.screenshot_alt: Screenshot captured at the time of the report
bug_report_viewer.screenshot_none: No screenshot was captured with this report.
bug_report_viewer.version_mismatch: This report was created with a different major version of FABKIT. Some data may not be compatible with the current version.

pwa.offline_ready: App is ready to work offline
pwa.update_available: New version available! Click reload to update.

image_upload.drag_or_click: Drop your image here or click to browse
image_upload.error_invalid_format: Invalid file format. Please use PNG, JPG, or GIF
image_upload.error_too_large: File is too large. Maximum size is {{maxSizeInMb, number}}MB
